ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the location data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location for which the report is generated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the report period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the report period */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, monthly, annual) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the report was updated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file if it is generated and stored as a file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the station is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of the station (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the station (e.g., operational, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last date the station was maintained */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station */,
  "last_data_received" TEXT /* Last time data was received from the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_stations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
